subject: fix(a11y): improve text contrast to meet WCAG AA minimums
body:
Audited all components after the dark theme change. text-text-muted
(#737373) failed WCAG AA on dark backgrounds, and 5 project accent
colors failed when used as text on #0a0a0a.

Changes:
- Bump --color-text-muted from #737373 (4.18:1) to #a3a3a3 (7.85:1)
- Lighten Graphiki accent: #6366f1 → #818cf8
- Lighten Sancio accent: #64748b → #94a3b8
- Lighten Four Ems accent: #2563eb → #60a5fa
- Lighten model-pear accent: #2D68FF → #7dd3fc
- Lighten repo-tor accent: #2D68FF → #60a5fa
- Update default project accent fallback: #737373 → #a3a3a3

Tags: a11y, contrast, styling, data
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dark-theme
Semver: patch

title: improve text contrast to meet WCAG AA minimums
